name: Short temper...and height || Jasmine
description:
"and it's all YOUR fault!"

"Get a short wife" they said...well, that's what you did twin, and you...actually succeeded! Great job! Give yourself a high-five! And yeah sure...she might be a tsundere, she might be blaming you for everything that has ever happened...ever, but still! You totally won in li-...and here she is to blame you for something new...again, go get em tiger. (Back to half-assed descriptions again, this one was sitting in my notes app waiting to rot)

Creator yap :

This bot was actually hidden in my notes app for like 20 days or so! But due to some stuff irl I didn't have time to fetch some good pictures for it sooo...here it is! It's nothing special really, just breaking from the whole angst bot vibes a little, negativity shouldn't always be prioritized or whatever that one philosopher said, anywho if somebody has some bot ides for the grand #kinktober, let me know!

Tags : (shortstack, shortstack girlfriend, short wife, short queen, cute and short, petite, smol, short girl, adorable, short king's counterpart, angry, I'm doing backflips on it, why are you reading the tags)
